name: agent-os-openai-proxy-cutover-package

openclawSideComponent.name: agent-os-openclaw-network-sidecar
openclawSideComponent.purpose: UNRESOLVED: production must choose and prove the exact contained placement for OpenClaw-originated OpenAI traffic. A host LaunchDaemon with only baseUrl changed is insufficient while pf is disabled.

topology.gmailBrokerInteraction: unchanged; Gmail broker remains host capability boundary and is not routed through this proxy
topology.ollamaInteraction: unchanged; heartbeat and gmail-reader remain local-model routes
startupOrder: OpenAI forward proxy with synthetic local-token and upstream credential custody
OpenClaw config cutover/restart after proxy health and egress proofs
topology.rollbackBoundary: before OpenClaw config/auth cutover and before removal of the direct provider apiKey

reviewRequiredCorrections: prove actual Colima/internal-network substrate with fixture containers and temporary networks
prove local-token custody path and parent traversal permissions
prove actual network enforcement, including DNS, IPv4, IPv6, direct-IP, restart, and host-network escape resistance
prove Gmail, Telegram, and Ollama network survival

artifacts.purpose: staged Node runtime executable for proxy container/rootfs
artifacts.creationMethod: copy from validated OpenClaw-bundled Node during authorized cutover
artifacts.rollback: remove if absent-before; restore metadata if existing-before
remove if absent-before; restore backup if existing-before

artifacts.purpose: real upstream OpenAI credential store owned only by proxy identity
artifacts.creationMethod: operator script copies value from live OpenClaw config without printing or command-line exposure after rollback point
artifacts.rollback: remove if absent-before; restore existing-before encrypted/secret file metadata if present

artifacts.purpose: synthetic local bearer token readable by OpenClaw and mounted read-only to proxy
artifacts.creationMethod: generate at least 256 bits entropy via stdin/file write only; no command-line exposure
artifacts.rollback: restore previous token or remove if absent-before

artifacts.purpose: cutover evidence, backups, rollback manifest, redacted metadata

authCleanupPlan: capture rollback point before changing live OpenClaw config
move real upstream OpenAI key into proxy custody without printing
set OpenClaw provider baseUrl/api/auth/apiKey to contained proxy and synthetic token
verify main, research-handoff-gate, and email-researcher route through proxy
verify heartbeat and gmail-reader remain local-only
scan openclaw.json, launchd env, agent auth profiles, generated models, snapshots, logs, and temp files for residual real OpenAI key indicators without printing values
retire superseded SecretRef resolver artifacts only after separate approval
